_comment: Species: Azure Dragon (青龙) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Azure Dragon

canonical.appearance: Serpentine dragon 100 m long, scales azure jade, antlers of crystal, breath summons storms
canonical.size: 100 m adult, millions of jin; true form spans continents
canonical.behavior: Divine spirit beast; sleeps in deep seas; awakens for era-defining events
canonical.habitat: Eastern seas, dragon palaces, water-aspected apex spirit veins
canonical.diet: water-attribute heavenly treasures, sea-spirit beasts, storm-essence
canonical.relationships: Bonded to Azure Dragon Divine lineage; rival of Vermilion Bird
canonical.bloodline: True Divine Beast lineage; one of Four Symbols
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: azure_dragon — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
